title: roldana eriophylla
intro: Roldana eriophylla, also known as Chrysactinia eriophylla, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Roldana eriophylla include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Roldana eriophylla can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
